title: What Is AI Pair Programming? AI Coding Tools for Developers
summary: IBM Technology presents an overview of AI pair programming and AI coding tools for developers. The video argues that AI can serve as an effective teammate to enhance debugging, code review, and overall developer productivity in real workflows.
writeup: IBM Technology explains AI pair programming and the AI coding tools developers use, framing AI as a teammate rather than a standalone code generator. The central claim is that these tools improve debugging, code review, and overall developer productivity within real workflows. The takeaways center on three areas: code generation, debugging support, and review assistance integrated into everyday development.
